title: Opening for Hotel Manager at The Lalit Hotels

jsonLd.title: Opening for Hotel Manager at The Lalit Hotels
jsonLd.description:
If you're a passionate Hotel Manager with drive and ambition, The Lalit Hotels in Dhanbad is the place for you. We're growing fast and need talented people to grow with us.

About The Lalit Hotels:
The Lalit Hotels is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Handle guest complaints and resolve issues promptly
• Assist in menu planning, costing, and food festival coordination
• Coordinate housekeeping and maintenance for room readiness
• Prepare daily operating reports and present to management
• Plan and execute banquets, events, and MICE functions
• Manage procurement of hotel supplies and control operating costs
• Manage front office operations including check-in/check-out

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Arch / M.Arch from recognized institution
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Tour Planning
• Proficiency in F&B Service
• Proficiency in Hotel Management
• Proficiency in Event Management
• Proficiency in Front Office
• Proficiency in Travel Management
• Proficiency in PMS Systems
• Proficiency in Opera PMS

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Company-sponsored certifications
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Dhanbad, Jharkhand, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with The Lalit Hotels!
